text:
Migrated the project to the App Router and removed the old `pages/` tree.

What changed:
- Replaced the homepage with [`app/page.tsx`](/home/user/workspace/app/page.tsx) using server-side data fetching, `headers()`, and typed post data.
- Replaced the blog index with [`app/blog/page.tsx`](/home/user/workspace/app/blog/page.tsx) using App Router ISR via `revalidate`.
- Replaced the dynamic post route with [`app/blog/[id]/page.tsx`](/home/user/workspace/app/blog/[id]/page.tsx) plus [`app/blog/[id]/BackButton.tsx`](/home/user/workspace/app/blog/[id]/BackButton.tsx), using `generateStaticParams()`, `generateMetadata()`, and `notFound()`.
- Replaced Pages API routes with route handlers:
  - [`app/api/posts/route.ts`](/home/user/workspace/app/api/posts/route.ts)
  - [`app/api/posts/[id]/route.ts`](/home/user/workspace/app/api/posts/[id]/route.ts)
- Replaced `_app` and `_document` with [`app/layout.tsx`](/home/user/workspace/app/layout.tsx), using `next/font/google` instead of manual font links.
- Replaced `_error` and `404` with [`app/error.tsx`](/home/user/workspace/app/error.tsx), [`app/global-error.tsx`](/home/user/workspace/app/global-error.tsx), and [`app/not-found.tsx`](/home/user/workspace/app/not-found.tsx).
- Converted the shared provider to TypeScript in [`components/AppProvider.tsx`](/home/user/workspace/components/AppProvider.tsx).
- Added typed schemas and fetch helpers in [`lib/posts.ts`](/home/user/workspace/lib/posts.ts).
- Kept the global styling in [`styles/globals.css`](/home/user/workspace/styles/globals.css), updated for App Router navigation buttons.

Cleanup:
- Removed the `pages/` directory entirely.
- Removed the old [`components/AppProvider.js`](/home/user/workspace/components/AppProvider.js) so only the typed version remains.

Verification:
- `npm run build` passes.

Note:
- Next updated [`tsconfig.json`](/home/user/workspace/tsconfig.json) to include `.next/dev/types/**/*.ts` during the build. I left that in place since it matches the generated type setup.

If you want, I can also do a second pass to consolidate the duplicate error UIs into a shared component.
